entry.data:
CLEAR
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE MID 50S
CALM WINDS

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 70S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 40S
NORTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 60S
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 80S

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN PARTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS AROUND 70
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
